message:
fix: rig dock handles duplicate identity beads + spawn warns if daemon not running

rig dock: When CreateRigBead fails (e.g., duplicate key from concurrent
dock or Dolt query hiccup), fall back to Show to use the existing bead
instead of erroring out. (gt-d8681)

sling: wakeRigAgents now checks daemon.IsRunning and warns if the daemon
is not running, since polecat triggering depends on daemon processing
deacon mail. (gt-9wv0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
